description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in coordinated athletic wear, featuring a zip-up jacket and matching pants with a prominent stylized 'F' logo on both the chest and back. The figure has a fit build and stands with arms slightly bent and hands open, suggesting a relaxed but alert posture. The clothing appears to be made of a soft, flexible material, likely synthetic fabric, and the figure wears gloves and high-top athletic sneakers. The hairstyle is short and tightly curled, with a distinct, voluminous top. The gloves and shoes have a slightly different texture and finish compared to the rest of the outfit, indicating a mix of materials. The overall appearance is modern and urban, suitable for street or sports environments.
description: A fit adult male in coordinated athletic wear with a prominent logo, gloves, and high-top sneakers, standing in a relaxed posture. The figure has short, tightly curled hair and a modern urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, logo on the chest, gloves, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile, arm position, and shoe details.
description_view_2: Back view displays the large logo on the jacket and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and arm position.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic zip-up jacket and matching athletic pants with gloves
